text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, February 02. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Space science and tech is a great focus. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that checking on some house maintenance items. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: We got invited to a neighbor's house. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've mapped the locations. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is practicing Minuet in G for the upcoming piano recital. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: I've got the grocery list ready. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's a big step. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Bedtime can be a challenge. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
